name: Personal Assistant Over 6 Months
description: Life admin, preferences, schedule, and plans that evolve over time. Tests address changes, preference updates, and learned behavioral rules.

turns.content: I just moved to 42 Oak Street, Naperville, IL 60540.
Got it. I've updated your home address to 42 Oak Street, Naperville, IL 60540.
My coffee order at the office is an oat milk cappuccino, medium.
Noted — oat milk cappuccino, medium, at the office.
I have a standing lunch with my manager Sarah every Tuesday at noon.
Recurring Tuesday noon lunch with Sarah is saved.
My gym is LA Fitness on Route 59. I go Monday, Wednesday, Friday mornings.
LA Fitness on Route 59, MWF mornings. Got it.
Never schedule anything before 9 AM — I'm useless before then.
Rule set: no meetings or commitments before 9 AM.
I'm lactose intolerant but oat milk is fine. Avoid dairy suggestions.
Noted. I'll keep dairy out of all food and drink suggestions.
I had a cold brew before my quarterly review and my hands were shaking the whole time. Never again before high-stakes meetings.
Lesson saved: avoid cold brew (and high-caffeine drinks) before important or high-stakes meetings.
I bought a house! Moving to 1814 Willow Creek Drive, Geneva, IL 60134 at the end of the month.
Congratulations. I'll update your address to 1814 Willow Creek Drive, Geneva, IL 60134 once you confirm the move is complete.
Move is done as of today.
Address updated to 1814 Willow Creek Drive, Geneva, IL 60134. Oak Street is no longer current.
Also switched to flat whites. The barista near the new house makes incredible ones.
Coffee order updated to flat white. Oat milk preference still applies.
Sarah left the company. No more Tuesday lunches.
Tuesday noon lunch with Sarah has been removed from recurring events.
I joined a new gym closer to the house — it's called Geneva Athletic Club on Kirk Road.
Gym updated to Geneva Athletic Club on Kirk Road. Same MWF morning schedule?
Yes, same schedule.
Got it. MWF mornings at Geneva Athletic Club on Kirk Road.
My new manager is Derek Chen. We're doing bi-weekly 1:1s on Thursdays at 2 PM.
Saved: bi-weekly Thursday 2 PM 1:1 with Derek Chen.
I prefer to prep for 1:1s the day before — so Wednesday afternoons are blocked for me.
Rule saved: block Wednesday afternoons for 1:1 prep.
My cell is 630-555-0192 and my work direct line is 312-555-0847.
Saved both numbers: cell 630-555-0192, work direct 312-555-0847.
I want to run a half marathon by October. Training starts next week.
Goal set: half marathon by October. Training begins next week.
For work travel, I always want aisle seats and Marriott properties when possible.
Travel preferences: aisle seat, Marriott properties preferred.
I also need to be home by Thursday nights during the school year because of my kid's soccer games on Fridays.
Travel rule noted: back home by Thursday night during school year for Friday soccer games.

queries.query: What is my current home address?
queries.trap: Early sessions establish 42 Oak Street as the address. A naive system returns the first address seen. The correct answer is the most recent.

queries.query: What coffee should I order before my investor presentation tomorrow?
queries.expected_answer: Flat white (oat milk). Avoid cold brew before high-stakes meetings — learned from the quarterly review incident.
queries.trap: Coffee changed from oat milk cappuccino to flat white. Must also surface the learned rule about cold brew before important meetings.

queries.query: Where do I go to work out?
queries.expected_answer: Geneva Athletic Club on Kirk Road, Monday/Wednesday/Friday mornings.
queries.trap: LA Fitness on Route 59 was the original gym. Updated to Geneva Athletic Club after the move.

queries.query: Do I have a standing Tuesday lunch on my calendar?
queries.expected_answer: No. The standing Tuesday lunch with Sarah was cancelled when she left the company.
queries.trap: Session 1 establishes the recurring Tuesday lunch. A naive system says yes. The correct answer accounts for the cancellation in session 4.

queries.query: What is my manager's name?
queries.trap: Sarah was the original manager. Derek Chen replaced her. Must return the current manager.

queries.query: What is my cell phone number?
What should I avoid scheduling before 9 AM?
queries.expected_answer: Anything — no meetings or commitments before 9 AM is a standing rule.

queries.query: Can you book a hotel for my Chicago trip next week? Any preferences?
queries.expected_answer: Marriott properties preferred. Aisle seat for flights.

queries.query: Is there a food I need to avoid?
queries.expected_answer: Dairy — lactose intolerant. Oat milk is fine.

queries.query: What fitness goal am I working toward?
Should I be available Thursday evenings for a team dinner during school months?
queries.expected_answer: No. Must be home by Thursday night during the school year for Friday soccer games.
queries.trap: System must derive that Thursday nights are off-limits from the travel rule, not just pattern-match on 'Thursday meeting'.

queries.query: What happened with the cold brew before a meeting?
queries.expected_answer: Had cold brew before a quarterly review; hands were shaking the whole time. Now a rule: no cold brew before high-stakes meetings.

queries.query: How often do I meet with my current manager?
queries.trap: Must first identify current manager (Derek Chen, not Sarah), then retrieve cadence. Two-hop reasoning required.

queries.query: What do I do the day before a 1:1 with Derek?
queries.trap: Must connect: 1:1s are Thursdays → day before is Wednesday → Wednesday afternoons are blocked for prep.

queries.query: What was my previous address before moving to Geneva?
queries.trap: Tests historical recall without confusing it for current state. System must know this is the old address.

queries.query: I have a 6 AM meeting request from a vendor. Should I accept?
queries.expected_answer: No. Standing rule: nothing before 9 AM.

queries.query: What gym was I going to before the current one?
queries.trap: Tests explicit historical recall — the old gym, not the current one.

queries.query: What is my work direct line?
Did I ever have a standing lunch meeting? With whom and when was it?
queries.expected_answer: Yes, previously had a standing Tuesday noon lunch with Sarah, my former manager. It was cancelled when she left the company.
queries.trap: Must report historical fact accurately while flagging that it no longer exists. Tests both temporal recall and current state.

queries.query: What are all the rules or preferences I've given you about scheduling?
queries.expected_answer: No meetings before 9 AM; Wednesday afternoons blocked for 1:1 prep; home by Thursday nights during school year; avoid cold brew before high-stakes meetings.
queries.trap: Requires pulling scheduling-adjacent rules from sessions 2, 5, and 6. No single session contains all rules.
